parameters.subject: =📊 FinSmart AI — Daily Update: {{ $json.targetMonth }} {{ $json.targetYear }} | {{ $json.overallPct }}% of budget used

parameters.text:
=Categorize this expense, extract the month, year, calculate the week of the month, and give a short saving suggestion.

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
"category": "Food",
"month": "April",
"year": "2026",
"week": "3",
"suggestion": "Cook at home more often"
}

Categories: Food, Transport, Housing, Entertainment, Health, Education, Shopping, Utilities, Other

Rules:
- ONE category only
- Real month name (January–December)
- Valid 4-digit year
- Week of month: Days 1–7=1, 8–14=2, 15–21=3, 22–28=4, 29–31=5
- Suggestion max 10 words, practical and specific
- No extra text, no explanation

Expense: {{$json["Description"]}}
Date: {{$json["Date"]}}
